zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hughes於1265年出生在英國素瑞莫萊 瓦利時，他的父親Sir Henry Hughes I19歲，母親Joan le Fleming21歲。他於1295年與Maud de Haselden在英國英格蘭素瑞莫萊 瓦利結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1335年在英國享年70歲，埋葬在英國。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When John Hughes was born in 1265, in Mole Valley, Surrey, England, his father, Sir Henry Hughes I, was 19 and his mother, Joan le Fleming, was 21. He married Maud de Haselden in 1295, in Mole Valley, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1335, in England, at the age of 70, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hughes est né en 1265, à Mole Valley, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Hughes I, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Joan le Fleming, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Haselden en 1295, à Mole Valley, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1335, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

Er hat 1295 in Mole Valley, Surrey, England, United Kingdom Maud de Haselden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1335 im Alter von 70 Jahren in England und wurde in England begraben.

Lui sposato Maud de Haselden nel 1295, nel Mole Valley, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1335, nel England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Hughesが1265年にイギリススリーモル ヴァリーで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Hughes Iは19歳，母Joan le Flemingは21歳であった。1295年にイギリスイギリススリーモル ヴァリーでMaud de Haseldenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1335年にイギリスで70歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Hughes(이)가 1265년 영국 수리 모일 발리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry Hughes I(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan le Fleming(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 모일 발리에서 Maud de Haselden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1335년 영국에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Maud de Haselden em 1295, em Mole Valley, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hughes родился в 1265 г. в местности мол валли, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Henry Hughes I было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan le Fleming, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Haselden в 1295 г. в местности мол валли, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1335 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.
